title: Boarding School Juliet
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode TV season (LIDEN FILMS, 2018) with no filler. Episode-to-chapter basis from the AnimeFillerGuide conversion: the anime adapts manga chapters 1-19 (through Volume 4), roughly 1.5 chapters per episode. Manga by Yousuke Kaneda is complete at 16 volumes; the story concludes with the "West Arc" at chapter 119, and AniList lists 121 chapters counting the volume bonus/extra chapters, so the final chapters-only entry extends to 121. Tail-arc chapter boundaries (post-episode 12) are grouped from Wikipedia volume ranges and ANN chapter titles and are approximate.
